name: CTUFT v1.0 - Fixed 4D Topology-Dynamic Spectral Dimension
body:
## CTUTFT v1.0 Release

### Papers
- main.pdf (190 pages) - Full theory
- ctuft_arxiv.pdf (3 pages) - Compact version

### Source
- main.tex
- ctuft_arxiv.tex

### Key Results
- SM gauge group derivation
- CKM matrix 99.9% accuracy
- Six GW polarization modes
- Zero free parameters
